evidence.source_title: Two Iranian Intellectuals: Motahari and Soroush — ResearchGate
evidence.description: Soroush approached Motahhari at the University of Tehran for instruction; Motahhari introduced him to a clergyman with whom Soroush studied Islamic philosophy. Motahhari's commentary on Mulla Sadra made a profound impression on Soroush.
With Motahhari's encouragement, Ayatollah Khomeini read Soroush's early work and reportedly marvelled at the erudition of its young author

editorial_notes: Motahhari was a formative intellectual influence on the young Soroush before the revolution.
